_meta.description: Curated genres + 'sounds like' lines per artist for EDC LV 2026. Hand-built without API calls (PRD §7 Tier 2 fallback content). Keys must exactly match artist_name in data/lineup.json.

fields.genres: string[] — list of genre tags shown as caps eyebrow in the Lineup expansion
fields.sounds_like: string — single-sentence vibe description ('Sounds like X with Y energy.')
fields.spotify_id: OPTIONAL string — 22-char Spotify artist ID (from open.spotify.com/artist/{ID}). When present, the Lineup detail view links directly to the artist's Spotify page. Otherwise it falls back to a search URL. Add IDs incrementally as you verify them; do not guess.
